ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: White cabbage (45%), mayonnaise (39%) (rapeseed oil, water, pasteurised egg yolk, vinegar, soft brown sugar, potato starch, salt, citrus fibre, dried egg-white, dried mustard), carrots (15%), onions (1%)
